# Farid Sayago — MLOps Engineer Portfolio

Farid Sayago is an MLOps and data engineer from Colombia. He builds reliable data pipelines, cloud infrastructure, and AI systems that stay useful after the demo ends.

## Professional Experience

- Data Analyst at Intcomex (July 2025 – February 2026): ETL pipelines, OLAP dashboards, Power BI reporting, Human Capital analytics, and operational reporting across 14+ countries.
- Lead Investigator at Universidad Santo Tomás (June 2022 – January 2026): econometric models, R, Python, academic publications, Business Intelligence visualizations.
- Associate Investigator at Universidad Santo Tomás (June 2024 – January 2025): Big Data processing with Dask, ethical AI standards, automated data pipelines for foreign trade datasets.

## Projects

- wiener-git: Python implementation of Git internals for content-addressable storage, object serialization, and CLI design.
- WHTTP: HTTP/1.1 server written in C for raw socket I/O, parsing boundaries, response formatting, and security-aware request handling.
- Wiener Tickets: reproducible MLOps pipeline for ticket classification with data ingestion, feature engineering, supervised training, experiment tracking, and retraining strategy.

## Skills

Python, SQL, Power BI, AWS, PyTorch, Machine Learning, ETL pipelines, OLAP dashboards, Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, Linux, Dask, R, Business Intelligence, AI agent orchestration, Git.

## Certifications and Learning

LinkedIn-listed certifications include AI Software Engineer, Data Engineer, IBM Python, Análisis y Visualización de Datos, and Inglés Avanzado C1.

Platzi public profile courses include AWS fundamentals, English C1, backend introduction, terminal and command line, AI tools for data teams, math for data science and AI, differential calculus for data science and AI, math fundamentals, and basic computing.
